title: Clippy: 3 suboptimal_flops — use f.mul_add for fused-multiply-add
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

**Dimension:** Performance & Complexity, Functional Correctness
**Lint:** clippy::suboptimal_flops

## Violation
Expressions of the form `a * b + c` on floats can be computed as a single fused-multiply-add via `a.mul_add(b, c)`. The FMA instruction is both faster on modern CPUs and numerically more accurate (single rounding instead of two).

## Locations
- src/tui/app.rs: 1034, 1036, 1039

## Mandated Refactor
```rust
// Before
let y = slope * x + intercept;
// After
let y = slope.mul_add(x, intercept);
```
These three lines are clustered (same function, consecutive) — likely a coordinate or progress-bar computation. Bonus: the lines also have `unreadable_literal` findings; fix both together.
